summary.text: Administration professional with 15+ years in regulated and operational environments. Skilled in managing concurrent caseloads, scheduling, stakeholder correspondence and delivering accurate outcomes under competing priorities. Experienced in liaising with diverse internal and external parties — including clients, agents, insurers and service providers — with a consistent service-first approach. Brings strong attention to detail, structured record-keeping and competency across the Microsoft Office suite and cloud-based systems, alongside a genuine willingness to learn and grow within a values-driven organisation.

experience.title: Creative Design and Business Operations
experience.context: Managed all client-facing administration, scheduling, correspondence and records for a self-run business across concurrent client commitments.
experience.key: Built strong client relationships through reliable communication and consistent follow-through across a steady caseload of concurrent projects.
bullets: Managed enquiries, scheduling, project coordination, quotes, invoices and records across multiple active client commitments simultaneously.
Delivered reliable, professional service to a diverse client base — responding promptly, following up proactively and maintaining organised records of all interactions.
Developed standard templates, scheduling systems and documented workflows that improved consistency and reduced turnaround time by approximately 30%.

experience.title: Health and Safety Administrator
experience.context: Coordinated health, workers compensation and compliance administration across a diverse portfolio of mining, construction and corporate clients.
experience.key: Managed concurrent cases involving coordination across applicants, clients, insurers, medical providers and rehabilitation professionals — directly comparable to liaising with applicants and migration agents.
bullets: Coordinated documentation and correspondence across multiple external parties simultaneously, progressing cases accurately while maintaining strict confidentiality.
Maintained scheduling, case records and supporting documentation for workers compensation and health cases, ensuring timely follow-up and accurate records throughout.
Provided professional, empathetic communication to all stakeholders when handling sensitive or complex situations requiring discretion.

experience.title: Safety Systems Administrator
bullets: Maintained accurate records, reporting and document control within a high-volume, time-sensitive operational environment.
Handled sensitive case information with discretion, ensuring all records were current, complete and accessible for relevant stakeholders.

experience.title: Administrative Officer, HSE Support
bullets: Coordinated administrative processes across multiple Queensland sites and stakeholder groups, managing registers, records and correspondence to firm deadlines.
Supported onboarding and induction scheduling, handling end-to-end coordination of documentation and communications for new workers.
Standardised documentation templates and reporting workflows to improve consistency and reduce manual effort across the team.

experience.title: Safety Administrator and Office Manager
experience.context: Administered safety and office operations for a workforce of 150+ across multiple rail infrastructure project sites, managing high-volume records and multi-site coordination.
experience.key: Managed records, scheduling, inductions and case documentation for 150+ workers simultaneously across multiple sites — demonstrating the caseload discipline this role requires.
bullets: Maintained structured records, registers and scheduling across a large, multi-site workforce — managing high volumes of concurrent cases with accuracy and attention to detail.
Coordinated across multiple internal and external stakeholder groups to progress scheduling, documentation and follow-up tasks on time.
Designed a reporting process that reduced average incident notification time from 45 minutes to under 10 minutes, later adopted across multiple sites.

education: Graduate Certificate in Occupational Health and Safety - Australian Catholic University
Certificate IV in Training and Assessment
Rehabilitation and Return to Work Coordinator training
certifications: Working with Children Check (Blue Card), current
Queensland C Class Driver's Licence, current
tools: Microsoft Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint and Teams
SharePoint, OneDrive, Google Drive and Dropbox
Oracle, MySQL, Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho Desk, Zendesk and Jira
Asana, ClickUp, Microsoft Project, Slack, Zoom and Confluence
